underlying_goal: Fix hyprlock configs across all themes to support 4 monitors with blur, correct input placement on bottom center monitor, and optionally match wallpapers per theme
friction_detail: Claude initially assumed solid color backgrounds instead of blur, and started adding wallpapers to all 4 monitors when user only wanted the bottom center one.
brief_summary: User needed all 9 theme hyprlock configs fixed for 4 monitors with blur and wallpaper backgrounds on DP-3; Claude updated them all with minor course corrections from the user.
